tests.title: Expanding a snippet whose body contains $CLIPBOARD and $CURRENT_DATE resolves them to the real clipboard text and the host date, leaving no literal variable tokens
errors:
Error: [2mexpect([22m[31mreceived[39m[2m).[22mnot[2m.[22mtoContain[2m([22m[32mexpected[39m[2m) // indexOf[22m

Expected substring: not [32m"$CLIPBOARD"[39m
Received string:        [31m"# Geometry of Numbers — Café[39m
[31m[39m
[31mA *naïve* introduction to the geometry of numbers.[39m
[31m[39m
[31mThe lattice points are counted by the following steps:[39m
[31m[39m
[31m1. Choose a symmetric convex body.[39m
[31m2. Apply Minkowski's theorem.[39m
[31m3. Minkowski bound[39m
[31m[39m
[31mThe Basel sum is $\\zeta(2) = \\pi^2/6$.[39m
[31m[39m
[31m> [!NOTE] Lattice note[39m
[31m> [39m
[31m> Minkowski bounds the points.[39m
[31m[39m
[31m![scatter](fig/plot.png)[39m
[31m[39m
[31m[39m
[31mSignature zone here: <!-- PPE-SIG clip=[7m$CLIPBOARD[27m date=$CURRENT_DATE year=$CURRENT_YEAR -->"[39m
